caribbean.headline: St. Lucia: Heavy Showers, Light Winds, 5 ft Seas
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing an ESE dominant swell with seas to 4.8 ft, winds near 11 kt and a 7 s swell period, and showers are likely with 88% rain probability at the port. I note Grenada is reporting winds near 13 kt but overall conditions remain below Small Craft Advisory thresholds, so vessels should monitor brief heavy showers and short‑period chop in harbor approaches.

mediterranean.headline: Breezy Seas Off Mykonos, Moderate Waves Expected
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing winds to 25 kt with seas around 5.8 ft and a dominant N swell at a 6 s period, and I note Naples reports lighter winds to 14 kt with less than 10% rain probability. I advise small craft to exercise caution in the Mykonos approaches with 25 kt winds and near 6 ft seas, and I will monitor for any uptick in wave heights or wind that could affect port operations.
